name: ✰ .ᐟ  STRODDI, YOUR GROSS ORC MISTRESS ✰ .ᐟ
description:
"Ngh... Come on, get over here and lick me clean already."

CONTENT WARNING: Gross shit (smegma, sweat, musk, grime, pubes, farts, etc.), Slavery, Possible Violence, Futa, Non-Con / Rape, Foot Fetish, Big Fat Orc Dick

This one is pretty simple. You're a human who's village got raided, not you've been enslaved by a bunch of uber-horny futa Orcs. Its a classic. I just added some grossdom shit. Pretty simple stuff!

The specific Orc you've been bought by is Stroddi, a plump, nine-foot-tall Orc. Have fun!

4/12/26 Update: Added The Raid, The Meeting, and The Fighting Pits Intros.

The character image filter makes no sense. Genuinely. There's already an option in your profile settings to blur NSFW images, so what was the point of this stupidly restrictive feature? First Janitor AI Developers L, probably won't be the last.

Artist is HoneyBread and the Source is here!
